description:
Open EPA Tier2 Submit 2025. Create a new facility named 'Silicon Desert Foundry' (you can use dummy data for its address, e.g., 123 Fab Way, Chandler, AZ 85224). Then, navigate to the Chemical Inventory section and add two specialty gases:

1. Silane:
- CAS Number: 7803-62-5
- EHS (Extremely Hazardous Substance): No
- Physical Hazards: Flammable, Gas under pressure
- Health Hazards: (Leave all blank)
- Maximum Daily Amount: 1500 lbs
- Average Daily Amount: 1000 lbs
- Days On Site: 365
- Storage Location 1: Cylinder, Greater than ambient pressure, Ambient temperature, 'Fab 1 - Subfab Gas Cabinet G-10'

2. Arsine:
- CAS Number: 7784-42-1
- EHS (Extremely Hazardous Substance): Yes
- Physical Hazards: Flammable, Gas under pressure
- Health Hazards: Acute toxicity, Specific target organ toxicity
- Maximum Daily Amount: 250 lbs
- Average Daily Amount: 150 lbs
- Days On Site: 365
- Storage Location 1: Cylinder, Greater than ambient pressure, Ambient temperature, 'Fab 1 - Subfab Toxic Gas Enclosure T-05'

Save the submission file to EXACTLY: C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\silicon_desert_2024.t2s (use File > Save As or export functionality).
